overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through a dark forest at dusk. The camera follows from behind as the character travels along winding dirt paths, passing through varying terrain from rocky hillsides to open meadows, ending with a lightning flash in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail at dusk with grassy verges

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along a winding dirt path through a pine forest at dusk, maintaining a steady pace

entered.detail: tall pine trees forming a dense forest wall on the left side of the path
tall pine trees forming a dense forest wall on the right side of the path
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with visible wheel ruts
green grass growing along the left edge of the dirt path
green grass growing along the right edge of the dirt path
dark teal and purple sky visible through the tree canopy indicating dusk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a white-haired character riding a horse through a forest at dusk. The path is surrounded by dense pine trees with grass growing along the edges, and the sky above shows a dark teal twilight color.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest hillside trail with dense canopy

events.description: large gray rocky outcrop appears on the right side of the path
path becomes darker and more enclosed as the forest canopy thickens overhead

agents.ego_description: navigating the horse along a winding path that curves around rocky terrain and through darker sections of forest

entered.detail: large gray rock formation jutting out from the right side of the path
thick overhead tree cover blocking most of the sky and darkening the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The rider continues through a narrower, more enclosed section of forest where a prominent rocky outcrop appears on the right. The lighting grows darker as the tree canopy thickens overhead, creating a more ominous atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow with path intersection and approaching storm

events.description: forest opens into a wide grassy meadow with a visible path intersection ahead
bright lightning flash illuminates the clouds ahead indicating an approaching storm

agents.ego_description: riding through open grassland toward a distant path intersection and an approaching lightning storm

entered.detail: wide open field of tall green grass extending to the left horizon
wide open field of tall green grass extending to the right horizon
dirt path splitting into two directions ahead in the distance
bush with white blossoms visible on the left side of the path
dark storm clouds gathering on the horizon ahead
bright white lightning illuminating the storm clouds

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up into a wide grassy meadow with a path intersection visible ahead. The terrain becomes more open with flowering shrubs visible along the path. As the rider continues, dark storm clouds gather on the horizon, culminating in a bright lightning flash that illuminates the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a darkening forest that gradually opens into a storm-swept meadow. It begins by trailing a white-haired rider on horseback along a dirt path flanked by dense pine trees under a dark teal twilight sky. As the rider progresses, the environment becomes more enclosed and ominous, with the tree canopy thickening overhead and a prominent rocky outcrop appearing on the right. The scene then expands as the forest gives way to a wide grassy meadow dotted with flowering shrubs and a path intersection. Finally, the horizon darkens with gathering storm clouds, culminating in a bright flash of lightning that illuminates the open sky.
